# TLS certificates for the admin backend facade (port 8443)
#
# This directory may stay empty in source control.
#
# On first `docker compose up -d`, the one-shot `nginx-cert-init` helper will:
#   1. check whether `tls.crt` and `tls.key` already exist here
#   2. if not, generate a self-signed pair in place
#   3. exit, after which `modelline-nginx` starts and mounts the same files read-only
#
# Existing files are never overwritten, so production certificates still work:
#   ADMIN_BACKEND_CERTS_DIR=/path/to/your/certs
#
# For production, replace the autogenerated self-signed cert with Let's Encrypt
# or your CA-issued pair and switch admin-host to strict TLS verification
# (`ADMIN_BACKEND_TLS_INSECURE=0`).
#
# `tls.crt` and `tls.key` are git-ignored.
